summary: URL Direct Connection Feature Testing Complete - All 10 backend tests passed (100%), Frontend UI tests passed (all features verified). New feature allows importing CSV from HTTP/HTTPS URL besides FTP.

issues: React warning: 'Cannot update a component while rendering a different component' in Login.jsx - same as previous iteration, not blocking

passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/suppliers with connection_type='url' and file_url - creates supplier correctly
Backend: POST /api/suppliers with connection_type='ftp' - continues to work for FTP
Backend: POST /api/suppliers without connection_type defaults to 'ftp'
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/{id}/sync with URL connection - downloads from HTTP/HTTPS
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/{id}/sync with missing URL - returns 400 error
Backend: POST /api/suppliers/{id}/sync with missing FTP config - returns 400 error
Backend: PUT /api/suppliers/{id} - can change connection type from FTP to URL
Backend: GET /api/suppliers/{id} returns connection_type and file_url fields
Backend: GET /api/suppliers list includes connection_type for each supplier
Backend: Real CSV download from public URL works and detects columns
Frontend: Add Supplier dialog opens with 3 tabs (General, Conexión, Config. CSV)
Frontend: Connection tab shows connection type selector with 2 options
Frontend: FTP/SFTP option shows all FTP fields (Host, Puerto, Usuario, Contraseña, Ruta)
Frontend: URL Directa option shows URL input field with Globe icon
Frontend: URL Directa shows info note about URL accessibility
Frontend: Switching between FTP and URL correctly shows/hides respective fields
Frontend: Existing supplier with URL type displays correctly in list
critical_code_review_comments: Login.jsx has React warning about updating state during render - carry over from previous iteration, consider using useEffect
seed_data_creation: Created test suppliers with TEST_ prefix during backend testing (auto-cleaned). Existing supplier 'Proveedor CSV URL' created via frontend.
context_for_next_testing_agent: URL Direct Connection feature is fully working. Backend supports connection_type='url' with file_url field. The download_file_from_url function downloads from HTTP/HTTPS URLs. Frontend has visual connection type selector with FTP/SFTP and URL Directa options. Test file at /app/backend/tests/test_url_connection.py. data-testid attributes used: supplier-file-url, supplier-ftp-host, supplier-ftp-port, etc.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A - This is a new feature implementation, not a bug fix
